test.name: Login Valid User

kw.name: Open Browser With Custom Chrome Options
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
Open browser with Chrome options to disable password manager popup

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sync Zephyr Result If Enabled
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Sync Result
kw.msg:
[INFO] Zephyr API initialized (EU)
============================================================ Updating Zephyr Execution ============================================================
[DEBUG] Searching for Zephyr key in tags: ['R7QE-T4080'] ✓ Found Zephyr key: R7QE-T4080
============================================================ VALIDATION PHASE: Checking all prerequisites ============================================================
[VALIDATION] Checking if test case 'R7QE-T4080' exists... [DEBUG] GET request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testcases/R7QE-T4080 [DEBUG] Response status: 200 ✓ Test case 'R7QE-T4080' exists [VALIDATION] Checking if test cycle 'R7QE-R9' exists... [DEBUG] GET request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testcycles/R7QE-R9 [DEBUG] Response status: 200 ✓ Test cycle 'R7QE-R9' exists [VALIDATION] Checking if folder '420067' exists in project 'R7QE'... [DEBUG] GET request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testcases?projectKey=R7QE&folderId=420067 [DEBUG] Response status: 200 ✓ Folder '420067' exists in project 'R7QE'
✓ ALL VALIDATIONS PASSED - Proceeding with execution creation
Step 1: Creating test execution for R7QE-T4080 with status PASS in cycle R7QE-R9... [DEBUG] POST request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testexecutions [DEBUG] Response status: 201 ✓ Test execution created successfully
============================================================ Update Result: R7QE-T4080 - PASS ============================================================
kw.doc: KEYWORD: Sync Result
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Sync test result to Zephyr in teardown

test.doc: Test login with valid credentials on SauceDemo

test.name: Login Invalid Password

kw.name: Open Browser With Custom Chrome Options
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
Open browser with Chrome options to disable password manager popup

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Sync Zephyr Result If Enabled
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Sync Result
kw.msg:
[INFO] Zephyr API initialized (EU)
============================================================ Updating Zephyr Execution ============================================================
[DEBUG] Searching for Zephyr key in tags: ['R7QE-T4081'] ✓ Found Zephyr key: R7QE-T4081
============================================================ VALIDATION PHASE: Checking all prerequisites ============================================================
[VALIDATION] Checking if test case 'R7QE-T4081' exists... [DEBUG] GET request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testcases/R7QE-T4081 [DEBUG] Response status: 200 ✓ Test case 'R7QE-T4081' exists [VALIDATION] Checking if test cycle 'R7QE-R9' exists... [DEBUG] GET request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testcycles/R7QE-R9 [DEBUG] Response status: 200 ✓ Test cycle 'R7QE-R9' exists [VALIDATION] Checking if folder '420067' exists in project 'R7QE'... [DEBUG] GET request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testcases?projectKey=R7QE&folderId=420067 [DEBUG] Response status: 200 ✓ Folder '420067' exists in project 'R7QE'
✓ ALL VALIDATIONS PASSED - Proceeding with execution creation
Step 1: Creating test execution for R7QE-T4081 with status FAIL in cycle R7QE-R9... [DEBUG] POST request to: https://eu.api.zephyrscale.smartbear.com/v2/testexecutions [DEBUG] Response status: 201 ✓ Test execution created successfully
============================================================ Update Result: R7QE-T4081 - FAIL ============================================================
kw.doc: KEYWORD: Sync Result
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Sync test result to Zephyr in teardown

test.doc: Test login with invalid password on SauceDemo
